data.title: QXO Seals $11 Billion Beacon Roofing Supply Buyout, Ending Takeover Battle With Cash-Packed Deal
data.description: NYSE: QXO trading higher premarket after announcing merger with NASDAQ: BECN for $124.35 per share in cash. Tender offer extended until 3/31/2025.

data.title: SoundHound AI Short Interest Jumps To 32.9%: 'Bring It On,' Says CEO, Shorts 'Only Make The Price Of Winning Bigger'
data.description: Short interest on SoundHound AI has risen by 18%, however, the CEO remained confident in the company's growth prospects.

data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Recalls Over 46,000 Cybertrucks Due To Safety Concerns
data.description: Tesla recalling 46,096 Cybertruck vehicles in the U.S. due to exterior panel safety issue. This adds to a series of recalls for the electric vehicle.

data.title: Broadcom Shares Up Over 3% After This Signal
data.description: A significant trading signal occurred for Broadcom stock, as it demonstrated a Power Inflow at $192.17, after which AVGO rose up to 3.2%.

data.title: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Weigh In On 3 Energy Stocks With Over 6% Dividend Yields
